items.note: Baked-in '99' text causes double-number display bug in-game; needs version without text
Inspection: stripes thicker than spec (#C9A86B + #2B1D12 fine pinstripes); horizontal-tile butt-edge test needed before approval
REJECTED (Gemini score 3): Inner cup not transparent (opaque brown wall); palette wrong (too dark/saturated blue); painterly variable outline not crisp 2px ink
REJECTED (Gemini score 5): BG not transparent (light purple/gray fill); inner cup opaque gold/tan instead of transparent void; soft shadow rendered as purple glow
REJECTED (Gemini score 4): Uses real blur/glow shader (HARD RULE violation, paper strips required); 3D-render lighting feel; missing flat 2px ink outline
REJECTED (Gemini score 4): Stripe red instead of #FFB7D0 pink; inner cup opaque dark; BG not transparent (light gradient)

INSPECTION (Gemini score 6): Sad-face icon over-detailed (pig-like instead of dot eyes + arc mouth); card rotation applied to inner layers not whole card; bbox 443x331 vs spec 600x540; borderline — manual decide
REJECTED (Gemini score 3): Wet/glossy 3D-render feel not washi paper; large bubble spots not subtle grain; missing ink outline along edges
REJECTED (Gemini score 2): BG not transparent (solid blue gradient); main color royal blue not steel #5577CC; no visible ink outline
REJECT: 3D plastic shell, real bloom/glow, math-perfect circle, no ink outline, no paper-strip neon. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
REJECT: photorealistic synthwave with bloom/DOF, no paper-cut layers, no ink outline, tile-ability unclear. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
REJECT: glossy 3D candy disc, math-perfect edges, sprinkles as glossy beads (not paper rects), no ink outline. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
REJECT: full 3D plastic blob, no ink outline, no wobble, sprinkles glossy not paper, no distinct cut-paper layers. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
REJECT: 3D glossy satin ribbon, clean modeled folds (no torn ends), heart as 3D sticker, no ink outline, no wobble. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
INSPECTION: closest to spec — paper-stack ribbons + gentle wave OK, but only 2 wisps (need 4-6), deckle edge weak, ink outline barely visible. See forge/atlas-3-review-rejects.md.
Inspection: baked dark vignette/shadow in BG breaks transparent compositing; otherwise palette+structure+wobble OK
REJECT: secondary cyan/blue color in upper corners (must be pure violet); glow too opaque, outer edge too defined; halo fills ring not pure rim
REJECT: opaque blue/cyan corner pixels (must be transparent BG); glow too neon-bright not soft 25% alpha; missing rim shape, looks like solid object not soft halo
REJECT: opaque pink center (must be transparent center -> outer fade); reads as solid glow not 'rim halo'; alpha falloff inverted
APPROVE: large googly eyes with eyebrows, cream sclera + dark pupil + cream highlight, ink outline, transparent BG. Visual override of Gemini false-positive (rejected as 3D - actually 2D paper-cut).

APPROVE: smiley mouth crescent with cream body + ink mouth-line + 2 pink blush dots. Matches Atlas-5 cell 2 spec exactly. Visual override of Gemini false-positive (Gemini wrongly expected 'eyes only').

APPROVE: gold tiara with cream highlight, 5 triangular tips, central pink gem + cyan + violet side gems. Ink outline, transparent BG, hand-drawn wobble. Visual override of Gemini false-positive on transparency.
APPROVE: red headband + dark band underlay, white front circle with kanji symbol, ink outline, transparent BG, hand-drawn wobble. Matches spec.
APPROVE: tall purple cone hat with bent tip, 3 cream stars, gold buckle band, ink outline, hand-drawn wobble. Palette internally consistent (purple/gold/cream).
APPROVE: deerstalker cap with checkered pattern, tan/khaki body, dark band, ear-flap shapes. NO violet/magenta leak (slicer cleanup verified). Bow on top is a nice extra detail.
APPROVE: wide-brim cowboy hat, warm tan body, dark brown band, brim curves up at sides. Ink outline, hand-drawn wobble, transparent BG.
APPROVE: yellow summer sun-hat with cream rim band, white flower with yellow center, rounded brim. Ink outline, transparent BG.
INSPECTION: alternate v2 hole rim — kept as fallback. PRIMARY uses atlas-holes-v1 (taller grass blades + warmer dirt + chunky stone bottom band better matches paper-craft layered-cut style).
INSPECTION: alternate v2 (clusters of single fluffy clouds vs v1's thick foam ring). v1 chosen PRIMARY for stronger 3D depth + warmer dirt rim.
INSPECTION: alternate v2 — flatter geometric crystals (v1 has chunkier 3D facets). v1 chosen PRIMARY for richer depth.
INSPECTION: alternate v2 (radial neon strips vs v1 outer ring of segments). v1 chosen PRIMARY for stronger arcade-tube paper-craft read at small sizes.
INSPECTION: alternate v2 has fewer candy beads + warmer cream stripes. v1 chosen PRIMARY for vibrant 4-bead variety + cleaner stripe contrast.
INSPECTION: standalone crown anchor decoration; not yet wired. Reserved for level-select / crown stamp UX.
